Guerreros Unidos.description: Mexican criminal organization operating in Morelos and Guerrero states, founded in 2010 by Cleotilde Toribio Rentería (alias El Tilde) after the fragmentation of the Beltrán Leyva Cartel. Engaged in drug trafficking, homicide, kidnapping, extortion, and other crimes. Notorious for the 2014 disappearance of 43 students in Iguala. Currently active.

descriptions: Guerreros Unidos is a splinter group of the Beltrán-Leyva Organization.
edges.evidence_quote: Guerreros Unidos (United Warriors) in Morelos and Guerrero

descriptions: Guerreros Unidos is a splinter group of Beltrán-Leyva Cartel.
edges.evidence_quote: Guerreros Unidos en Morelos, Guerrero, Puebla, Oaxaca, y Ciudad de México.

descriptions: Infobox lists Guerreros Unidos as an enemy of CJNG.

edges.evidence_quote: Guerreros Unidos was founded in 2010 as two factions from La Familia Michoacana merged an alliance with different cartels. One faction chose sides with the Tijuana , Beltrán-Leyva , Juárez and Los Zetas cartels.

edges.evidence_quote: El grupo fue formado en el año 2010 a raíz de la desaparición del Cártel de los Beltrán Leyva y una escisión de La Familia Michoacana.

descriptions: Los Rojos had a dispute with Guerreros Unidos, as stated in the context of the murder of Gisela Mota.
edges.evidence_quote: El gobernador del estado, Graco Ramírez, señaló que el crimen había sido ejecutado por miembros del ya desaparecido cártel de 'Los Rojos', quienes sostenían una disputa con Guerreros Unidos.

descriptions: The ABT fought and nearly exterminated the Mandingo Warriors.
edges.evidence_quote: The ABT's first war was with the black gang Mandingo Warriors, who were beaten to the point of near extermination within the prison system.

edges.evidence_quote: La primera guerra de la ABT fue con la pandilla negra Mandingo Warriors, quienes fueron atacados hasta el punto de casi exterminarlos dentro del sistema penitenciario.

Pettingill family.description: The Pettingill family is a Melbourne-based criminal family headed by matriarch Kath Pettingill. Members have convictions for drug trafficking, arms dealing, and armed robberies. The family was involved in the 1988 Walsh Street police shootings and the Melbourne gangland killings, suffering a major blow with the murder of Victor Peirce. Their power has been greatly weakened since.

856 Gang.description: The 856 Gang is a Canadian criminal organization active in the Northwest Territories and British Columbia. It originated as a youth gang in Aldergrove, BC, around 2003, and later evolved into a sophisticated drug trafficking and arms trafficking group. The gang has been involved in cocaine distribution, firearms offenses, and violent crimes including murder. It has been targeted by multiple RCMP operations and has ties to the Red Scorpions.

descriptions: The 856 Gang is now considered a rival of the Hells Angels, having formerly been allied.
edges.evidence_quote: Today, the gang is thought to be rivals of the Hells Angels who were formerly in alliance with them.

descriptions: The 856 Gang made ties with a Hells Angels member, indicating cooperation.
edges.evidence_quote: Until September, 2007, they had made ties to a man named Len Pelletier of the Hells Angels

descriptions: The infobox lists Red Scorpions as an ally of the 856 Gang.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Red Scorpions

descriptions: The infobox lists UN (gang) as a rival of the 856 Gang.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Hells Angels , UN (gang)

descriptions: The 856 gang is a puppet gang controlled by the Hells Angels.
edges.evidence_quote: The 856 gang served as a puppet gang for the Hells Angels

descriptions: Infobox lists 856 gang as rival.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: 856 gang

Cártel de Caborca.description: Mexican criminal organization founded in 2015 by Rafael Caro Quintero and Miguel Caro Quintero, based in Sonora. It is involved in drug trafficking, particularly fentanyl and methamphetamine, and operates primarily in the border municipality of Caborca. The group is in conflict with Los Chapitos and La Mayiza over territory and drug routes. Despite the arrest of its founder in 2022, the organization remains active under new leadership.

edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Juárez Cartel , Jalisco New Generation Cartel

edges.evidence_quote: también tiene una disputa en Caborca contra La Mayiza

edges.evidence_quote: the main objective of Caro Quintero has been to dispute the territory of Sonora with the faction of Los Chapitos

edges.evidence_quote: En la actualidad el grupo tiene una disputa con el cártel de Los Chapitos

Latin Counts.description: The Latin Counts is an Indigenous Latino American street gang based in Chicago, Illinois, with a significant branch in Detroit, Michigan. Founded in 1955 by Tejano youth in the Pilsen neighborhood, it is a member of the People Nation alliance. The gang is involved in drug trafficking, racketeering, and other criminal activities.

Sindicato do Crime do Rio Grande do Nort.description: Brazilian criminal organization based in Rio Grande do Norte, founded on March 27, 2013, at the Alcaçuz penitentiary. It is the largest criminal group in the state, involved in drug trafficking, murders, robberies, extortion, and prison rebellions. Created as a reaction to the control of the Primeiro Comando da Capital (PCC), it has been in conflict with the PCC and other rival factions. The group remains active.

descriptions: Tehrik-e-Hurmat-e-Rasool is an affiliate of Lashkar-e-Taiba.
edges.evidence_quote: On 25 June 2014, the United States added several of LeT affiliates including Jamaat-ud-Dawa, Al-Anfal Trust, Tehrik-e-Hurmat-e-Rasool, and Tehrik-e-Tahafuz Qibla Awwal to the list of foreign terrorist organizations.

edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Brooklyn Camorra , D'Aquila crime family , Schiro crime family

descriptions: AWDSS had close relations with Feuerkrieg Division.
edges.evidence_quote: AWDSS also maintained particularly close relations with the Feuerkrieg Division in neighboring Estonia.

descriptions: Feuerkrieg Division is a subgroup of Atomwaffen Division in the Baltic states.
edges.evidence_quote: Baltic states (Feuerkrieg Division)

descriptions: Feuerkrieg Division was modeled after Atomwaffen Division.
edges.evidence_quote: In October 2018, a group which was modeled after Atomwaffen and called itself the Feuerkrieg Division was established in the Baltic states

descriptions: Atomwaffen Finland cooperated with Feuerkrieg Division.
edges.evidence_quote: The Finnish Resistance Movement and its successor Atomwaffen Finland cooperated with the group as well.

descriptions: Finnish Resistance Movement cooperated with Feuerkrieg Division.
edges.evidence_quote: The Finnish Resistance Movement and its successor Atomwaffen Finland cooperated with the group as well.

descriptions: Maniac Murder Cult co-operated with Feuerkrieg Division.
edges.evidence_quote: Under him MKU co-operated with the Feuerkrieg Division.

descriptions: Feuerkrieg originally organized with Sonnenkrieg Division.
edges.evidence_quote: originally organized with Sonnenkrieg

descriptions: The Base has links to Feuerkrieg Division.
edges.evidence_quote: The group has links to the Atomwaffen Division and the Feuerkrieg Division, which are far-right extremist groups.

descriptions: Sin City Titans is a sibling club of Sin City Deciples for metric bike riders.
edges.evidence_quote: riders of metric bikes, including sport bikes, are able to join the Deciple's sibling club, the Sin City Titans.

descriptions: The text lists Sin City Titans as an enemy of Wheels of Soul.
edges.evidence_quote: Enemies of the Wheels of Soul include the Outcast Motorcycle Club, Sin City Titans, Hells Lovers Motorcycle Club and the Street Soldiers.

Grady Gang.description: The Grady Gang was a New York City sneak thief gang during the 1860s, organized by fence John D. 'Traveling Mike' Grady after the American Civil War. The gang operated in Broadway's 'Thieves Exchange' and was known for the robbery of $2 million from financier Rufus L. Lord in 1866. Most members retired by the end of the decade, but Grady continued as a fence.

descriptions: Grady Gang competed against Marm Mandelbaum's gang as rivals.
edges.evidence_quote: Later, he competed against rival fence Marm Mandelbaum who had formed a gang of her own.

descriptions: Caballeros is a Bandidos prospect club.
edges.evidence_quote: On 20 June 2015, Road Tramps member Andrew "Odd" O'Donoghue was shot dead by Alan "Cookie" McNamara, a member of the Caballeros – a Bandidos prospect club.

descriptions: Satan's Guard is a puppet club of Hells Angels in Saguenay region.
edges.evidence_quote: Every Quebec region had its own puppet club: the Rockers Motor Club in Montreal, the Rowdy Ones in Sorel, the Evil Ones in Drummondville, the Satan's Guard in the Saguenay region, and the Jokers in St-Jean

Chee Kung Tong.description: Chinese secret society established in 1880, with roots in 18th-century Fujian, China. It promoted Chinese values, customs, and democracy, and supported Sun Yat-sen's revolution. The organization spread to the United States and Canada, with headquarters in San Francisco. It remains active today.

descriptions: The Chee Kung Tong had rivalries with Bo Sin Seer.
edges.evidence_quote: Two of the more notorious rivals to the Chee Kong tong were the Gee Sin Seer and the Bo Sin Seer...

descriptions: The Chee Kung Tong had rivalries with Gee Sin Seer.
edges.evidence_quote: Two of the more notorious rivals to the Chee Kong tong were the Gee Sin Seer and the Bo Sin Seer...

descriptions: Tse and Ping On were allied with Harry Mook, head of the local Chee Kung Tong.
edges.evidence_quote: Tse was allied with Harry Mook (Goon Chun Yee), head of the local CKT

descriptions: Tse joined Hung Mun before founding Ping On, indicating a predecessor or structural tie.
edges.evidence_quote: Tse joined the On Leong, but they expelled him shortly afterward and he joined the Hung Mun (Chee Kung Tong or CKT) social club in 1977, then founded the Ping On Club in 1982

descriptions: Listed as rivals in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Columbia Point Dawgs (long-standing), Vamp Hill Boys, H Block, X-men, Franklin Hill Giants, Greenwood Street Posse, Ruggles St , 1850 Washington St, Castle Square Cubs

descriptions: Brooklyn is listed as a rival of Peckham Boys in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Brooklyn, GAS Gang , Ghetto Boys , OC (Organised Crime) , Roadside G's

descriptions: 12th Street Players are listed as allies of the Gaylords in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: People Nation , Latin Kings , Insane South Side Popes , 12th Street Players, Indiana Aryan Brotherhood, Vice Lords , Latin Brothers

descriptions: The 12th Street Players are listed as an ally of the Chicago Outfit in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: 12th Street Players

descriptions: The 12th Street Players, affiliated with the Cicero crew (part of the Outfit), are suspected of ordering a murder.
edges.evidence_quote: The Cicero crew-affiliated 12th Street Players gang is suspected of ordering the hit.

descriptions: Paul Carparelli, a Chicago Outfit soldier, was formerly a member of the 12th Street Players gang.
edges.evidence_quote: Caparelli is former member of the 12th Street Players gang.

descriptions: Versace Longo fought a war with Giovinazzo over drug trafficking.
edges.evidence_quote: si scontrarono con i Giovinazzo (di Taurianova), in una guerra per il controllo del traffico di droga, tra il 1988 e il 1990

descriptions: Batallón Vasco Español conducted similar dirty war actions against ETA before GAL.
edges.evidence_quote: GAL activities were a follow-up of similar dirty war actions by death squads, actively supported by members of Spanish security forces and secret services, using names such as Batallón Vasco Español active from 1975 to 1981.

descriptions: Batallón Vasco Español was an anti-ETA group.
edges.evidence_quote: Anti-ETA groups: Batallón Vasco Español

Head Hunters Motorcycle Club.description: New Zealand outlaw motorcycle club formed in 1967 in East Auckland, evolving into an OMCG in 1985. Based in Ellerslie with chapters across the North Island, it is involved in drug trafficking, theft, murder, and money laundering. The club has over 1000 criminal convictions and was legally incorporated in 1996.

descriptions: 14K sells pseudoephedrine to Head Hunters.
edges.evidence_quote: They are involved in the importation of pseudoephedrine , a chemical precursor in the illicit manufacture of methamphetamine, from Hong Kong and mainland China, which they sell to local drug trafficking gangs, the Head Hunters and the Hells Angels .

descriptions: Head Hunters fought Black Power in a brawl in 1967.
edges.evidence_quote: members of the Head Hunters gang engaged in a brawl against then-rivals the Black Power

descriptions: Head Hunters absorbed Epitaph Riders by patching over.
edges.evidence_quote: the Epitaph Riders of Christchurch

descriptions: Head Hunters are allies with Filthy Few.
edges.evidence_quote: the Filthy Few

descriptions: Head Hunters are allies with Hells Angels.
edges.evidence_quote: They are allies of the Hells Angels

descriptions: Head Hunters killed a member of Highway 61 in 1983.
edges.evidence_quote: murdering rival-gang, Highway 61, member Steven Bliss

descriptions: Head Hunters killed a member of King Cobras in 1985.
edges.evidence_quote: convicted of murdering a member of the King Cobras, Siaosi Evalu

descriptions: Head Hunters are allies with Nomads.
edges.evidence_quote: the Nomads

descriptions: Head Hunters absorbed Satan's Slaves MC by patching over in 2014.
edges.evidence_quote: the Satan's Slaves MC in 2014

descriptions: Head Hunters absorbed Sinn Fein MC by patching over in 2011.
edges.evidence_quote: The Head Hunters "patched over" the Wellington-based Sinn Fein MC in 2011

descriptions: Hells Angels are allied with Head Hunters, indicating cooperation.
edges.evidence_quote: New Zealand's Hells Angels are allied with the Head Hunters and the Road Knights.

descriptions: King Cobras and Head Hunters cooperated in a large methamphetamine ring in 2003.
edges.evidence_quote: In 2003, members of the King Cobras ran a large methamphetamine ring along with the Head Hunters in one of Aucklands biggest drug cases.

descriptions: Infobox lists Head Hunters as an ally of Nomads.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Black Power, Head Hunters

edges.source: Mudundu 40 / Front de Résistance et de Défense du Kivu
descriptions: Mudundu 40/FRDKI cooperated with RCD-Goma.
edges.evidence_quote: A number of smaller Mai-Mai groups, such as the Mudundu 40 / Front de Résistance et de Défense du Kivu (FRDKI) and Mouvement de Lutte contre l'Agression au Zaïre / Forces Unies de Résistance Nationale contre l'Agression de la Républíque Démocratique du Congo (MLAZ/FURNAC), were reported to cooperate with the Rwandan military and Rally for Congolese Democracy–Goma (RCD-Goma).

Gente Nueva.description: Gente Nueva is a large group of well-trained gunmen serving as an elite armed wing of the Sinaloa Cartel. Founded in 1995 in Sonora, Mexico, it was created to counter the Juárez Cartel's influence in northwestern Mexico. The group has been involved in drug trafficking, kidnapping, and murder, and has engaged in a prolonged turf war with the Juárez Cartel and its enforcer wing, La Línea. As of 2012, Gente Nueva and the Sinaloa Cartel had emerged victorious in the conflict.

descriptions: Gente Nueva is listed as an ally of Artistas Asesinos in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Aliados: Cártel de Sinaloa , Gente Nueva , * Los Salazar , *

descriptions: Gente Nueva is listed as a rival of CJNG in infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Sinaloa Cartel , Tijuana Cartel , Santa Rosa de Lima Cartel , Los Viagras , Cárteles Unidos , Autodefensas , Nueva Plaza Cartel , Knights Templar Cartel , La Familia Michoacana , Cártel del Noreste , La Unión Tepito , Los Zetas , Zetas Vieja Escuela , Barrio Azteca (current status unknown) , Los Correa , Cartel del Abuelo , Grupo Sombra , Gente Nueva , La Nueva Familia Michoacana

descriptions: Cártel Independiente de Sonora was formerly known as Gente Nueva.
edges.evidence_quote: El Cártel Independiente de Sonora , también conocidos como Los Paredes y Los Salazar, es una federación criminal mexicana dedicada al narcotráfico , extorsión , lavado de dinero , entre otras actividades delictivas. Anteriormente Gente Nueva

descriptions: Artistas Asesinos fought alongside Gente Nueva as allies.
edges.evidence_quote: the Sinaloa cartel, which had employed the gangs known as Artistas Asesinos and Los Mexicles , along with its armed wing, Gente Nueva

descriptions: CJNG claimed responsibility for an attack initially attributed to Gente Nueva, but no direct relationship is stated.
edges.evidence_quote: the Jalisco New Generation Cartel later assumed full responsibility for the massacre and the incursions in the state of Veracruz

descriptions: Gente Nueva was created to fight the Juárez Cartel.
edges.evidence_quote: created to counter, battle and destroy the Juárez Cartel 's influence

descriptions: Gente Nueva has been involved in a four-year war against the Juárez Cartel.
edges.evidence_quote: Gente Nueva ha servido como la rama principal de la organización en Ciudad Juárez y en el resto del estado, donde se han involucrado en una guerra de cuatro años contra el Cártel de Juárez

descriptions: Gente Nueva, as part of Sinaloa Cartel, fought Los Zetas in Veracruz.
edges.evidence_quote: The tit-for-tat fighting between Los Zetas and the Sinaloa cartel started in the Mexican state of Veracruz

descriptions: Gente Nueva was formerly the armed wing and elite branch of the Sinaloa Cartel.

descriptions: Hells Angels were alleged perpetrators in the murder of Hirdmen MC's vice president.
edges.evidence_quote: On March 3, 1998, the vice president of the Hirdmen Motorcycle Club in Stockholm was killed by several gunshots to the neck. ... The investigation alleged the Hells Angels milieu as perpetrators, although no one was convicted.

descriptions: Revolucionarios split from 18th Street and became rivals with the Sureños faction.
edges.evidence_quote: a faction called the "Revolucionarios ("Revolutionaries") split off 18th Street in 2005, becoming rivals with the other members, who came to be known as the Sureños ("Southerners").

descriptions: Revolucionarios splintered from Barrio 18 and became rivals.
edges.evidence_quote: una facción llamada 'Revolucionarios' se separó de la calle 18 en 2005, convirtiéndose en rivales con los miembros restantes

descriptions: Hells Angels aligned with Prisoners of War.
edges.evidence_quote: The Australian Hells Angels have aligned themselves with the Coffin Cheaters , Immortals, Red Devils , Satans Soldiers, Vikings and the Prisoners of War, a prison gang operating inside HMP Barwon

descriptions: Order of the Blood is controlled by the Aryan Brotherhood.
edges.evidence_quote: On June 23, 2005, after a 20-month investigation, a federal strike force raided six houses in northeastern Ohio which belonged to members of the 'Order of the Blood', a criminal organization which is controlled by the Aryan Brotherhood.

descriptions: Order of the Blood is a criminal organization controlled by Aryan Brotherhood.
edges.evidence_quote: una organización criminal controlada por la Hermandad Aria.

Brödraskapet.description: Swedish prison gang founded on May 27, 1995 by inmates at Kumla maximum security prison. Engages in drug trafficking, arms trafficking, robbery, murder, and extortion. Considered a criminal organization by Swedish police under EU criteria. Active nationwide with an estimated 60-70 members.

descriptions: Asa MC merged with released Brotherhood members to form the first outside chapter.
edges.evidence_quote: At the end of the year 1995 the outlaw motorcycle club (omc) Asa MC in Stockholm joined up with Brotherhood members that had been released from prison and founded the first Brotherhood chapter outside of the prison walls.

descriptions: Infobox lists Hells Angels as rivals of Brödraskapet.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Hells Angels

descriptions: The Serb mafia is allied with Brödraskapet.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Hells Angels , Brödraskapet , Fucked For Life , Bratva , Obshchak , Zemun Clan , Serb Volunteer Guard

Serb mafia in Scandinavia.description: Organized crime group operating in Sweden, Norway, and Denmark, founded in the 1970s by Željko "Arkan" Ražnatović. Based in Stockholm and Copenhagen, it engages in cigarette smuggling, drug trafficking, robbery, extortion, and other crimes. The group gained media attention in the 1990s and is currently led by Milan Ševo.

descriptions: The Proietti clan killed Franco Giuseppucci, triggering a violent war between the two groups.
edges.evidence_quote: Il primo componente della Banda a cadere fu Franco Giuseppucci , ucciso a Piazza San Cosimato nel cuore del quartiere di Trastevere, il 13 settembre 1980 , in un agguato orchestrato da parte di esponenti del clan rivale della famiglia Proietti , detti i Pesciaroli

edges.evidence_quote: Clan helps the Banda della Magliana in eliminating the rival Proietti Clan which occurred between the end of the 1970s and the beginning of the 1980s.
